title: Create: Trains & Trams
description: Create Modpack that focuses on creating Trains & Trams
body:
Modpack about the Create mod focusing on being able to make rail vehicles and getting more opportunities to choose from when building **Trains & Trams**. There's also possibility for making cars with the Valkyrien Skies mod and Trackwork.

Some mods in this modpack are: Create, Create: Steam And Rails, JEI, Create: Tramways, and much more

I've seen many people like me searching for the ultimate creative mode modpack to use, but there aren't really any modpacks that do this! therefore i just made one myself :) Now i want you to check this modpack out and.. who knows? Maybe show your friends!
# 
### If you unlock the modpack to add your own mods,
# Then do NOT update any of the current mods
## This causes incompatibility between ALL MODS

Thank you for using this modpack.
Please take a short look at the Critical Information.

## Critical Information:
### Required Items:
 Internet Connection
 > **Uses For Internet Connection**
 
 > When in-game you can go to your browser and enter this url: ```localhost:3876```. This shows a map of all the tracks, and trains, and stations, and signals, and.. Yeah you got it
 > 
 > The Create: Tramways mod uses TTS to announce stops. This only works with a schedule.
